description: Bestiary boss epithets (Phase 39). Source: docs/bestiary-catalog.md §2. A boss = the dominant line's tier creature promoted one tier, prefixed (en) / suffixed (pt) with a gold epithet chosen by session hash. en format: '[Epithet], the [Creature]'. pt format: '[Creature], [Epítome]'. The stored name{en,pt} is the epithet fragment exactly as the pool lists it; the resolver composes the full boss name. slug is the deterministic-pick key.
